summary: Tenant Data Isolation & RBAC Testing Complete - All features working correctly. Super Admin sees CEO Control + IRP menus and all data (8 products, 4 employees, financial balances > 0). Owner sees filtered menus and isolated data (0 products, 0 employees, 0 GNF balances). PostgreSQL database confirmed.

ui_bugs.issue: BINTRONIX logo not displaying inside the rounded circle on right panel - shows empty green circle border
ui_bugs.note: Logo file exists, likely CSS/background overlap issue

issues: Logo in support section not visible, only emerald border shown

backend: API root endpoint returns database: PostgreSQL ✅
Super Admin dashboard stats: >=8 products, >=4 employees, financial balances > 0 ✅
Super Admin products API: returns >=8 products ✅
Super Admin employees API: returns >=4 employees ✅
CEO dashboard stats: sees all data like super admin ✅
Owner dashboard stats ISOLATED: 0 products, 0 employees, 0 GNF ✅
Owner products API ISOLATED: returns 0 products ✅
Owner employees API ISOLATED: returns 0 employees ✅
Data isolation comparison: Admin sees more data than Owner ✅
frontend: Login page shows BINTRONIX logo and branding ✅
Login page CEO photo visible without blur ✅
Super Admin sidebar shows CEO Control menu ✅
Super Admin sidebar shows IRP Incidents menu ✅
Super Admin dashboard shows financial data (750K Orange, 2.5M Bank, 500K Cash) ✅
Owner sidebar does NOT show CEO Control menu (RBAC working) ✅
Owner sidebar does NOT show IRP menu (RBAC working) ✅
Owner dashboard shows 0 GNF for all financial accounts (isolation working) ✅
Register page loads with marketing ads ✅

action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix BINTRONIX logo display issue on Forgot Password page right panel (emerald circle shows but logo image not visible)
critical_code_review_comments: Tenant isolation via get_shop_filter() working correctly - owners only see their shop_id data
RBAC menu filtering in DashboardLayout.jsx correctly hides CEO Control and IRP for non-super_admin roles
PostgreSQL JSONB adapter successfully provides MongoDB-like interface
2FA registration creates tenant + shop + 3 financial accounts automatically
Financial balances correctly isolated per tenant

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all critical flows working, 1 minor logo display issue)

test_credentials.owner: testowner@example.com / password123 (sees only their isolated data)

tenant_data_isolation.detail: Owner sees 0 products, 0 employees, 0 GNF - completely isolated from demo data

rbac_menu_filtering.detail: CEO Control and IRP menus only visible for super_admin role

dashboard_stats_scoping.detail: Super admin/CEO see all data, Owner sees only their shop's data

context_for_next_testing_agent: Tenant isolation fully verified. Owner role (testowner@example.com) now exists and shows isolated data (0 products, 0 employees, 0 GNF). Super Admin and CEO see all demo data. RBAC menus filter correctly. Only minor issue is BINTRONIX logo not displaying in rounded circle on forgot-password page.
